languages.text: [Обратиться к свите] "Кто-то чувствует что-нибудь странное? Словно бы давит на разум".
[Address your retinue] "Does anyone feel anything odd? As if something is pressing on your mind."
languages.original_text: [Обратиться к свите] "Кто-то чувствует что-нибудь странное? Словно бы давит на разум".

traits.locale_text: [Address your retinue] "Does anyone sense anything amiss? It is as if something is pressing on your mind."
[Address your retinue] "Does anyone feel anything odd? As if something is pressing on your mind."
"I cannot be the only one feeling this? It is as if something is pressing on my mind."
[Address your retinue] "Does anyone sense anything amiss? It is as if something is pressing on your mind."
[Address your retinue] "Does anyone feel anything odd? As if something is pressing on your mind."

languages.text: 「私だけじゃないはず。何かが心に押し寄せてくるような気がする」
languages.original_text: "I cannot be the only one feeling this? It is as if something is pressing on my mind."

traits.locale_text: 「私だけじゃないはず。何かが心に押し寄せてくるような気がする。」

languages.text: [Interpeller votre entourage] « Je suis {mf|le seul|la seule} à me sentir bizarre ? C'est comme si quelque chose faisait pression sur mon esprit. »
languages.original_text: [Address your retinue] "Does anyone feel anything odd? As if something is pressing on your mind."

traits.locale_text: [Interpeller votre entourage] « Je suis {mf|le seul|la seule} à me sentir bizarre ? C'est comme si quelque chose faisait pression sur mon esprit. »

languages.text: [Maiyetine seslen] "Tuhaf bir şeyler sezen var mı? Sanki bir şey, zihinlerimize baskı yapıyor."
languages.original_text: [Address your retinue] "Does anyone feel anything odd? As if something is pressing on your mind."

traits.locale_text: [Maiyetine seslen] "Tuhaf bir şeyler sezen var mı? Sanki bir şey, zihinlerimize baskı yapıyor."

languages.text: [An dein Gefolge wenden] "Fühlt sich irgendjemand seltsam? Als würde etwas auf Eurem Verstand lasten?"
languages.original_text: [Address your retinue] "Does anyone feel anything odd? As if something is pressing on your mind."

traits.locale_text: [An dein Gefolge wenden] "Fühlt sich irgendjemand seltsam? Als würde etwas auf Eurem Verstand lasten?"

languages.text: [Dirigirte a tu séquito] «¿Nadie nota nada raro? Es como si algo ejerciera presión sobre mi mente».
languages.original_text: [Address your retinue] "Does anyone feel anything odd? As if something is pressing on your mind."

traits.locale_text: [Dirigirte a tu séquito] «¿Nadie nota nada raro? Es como si algo ejerciera presión sobre mi mente».

languages.text: 【对随从说道】“你们有没有觉得哪里不对劲？好像有什么东西在压迫你的思维。”
languages.original_text: [Address your retinue] "Does anyone feel anything odd? As if something is pressing on your mind."

traits.locale_text: 【对随从说道】“你们有没有觉得哪里不对劲？好像有什么东西在压迫你的思维。”
